arts.ttl: Rumour now coming from Manchester United should make Arsenal desperate for Tottenham to win the Europa League - opinion
arts.sum: Arsenal fans are presumably hoping to see Manchester United beat Tottenham in the UEFA Europa League final. The Gunners and Spurs are bitter rivals, with...

arts.ttl: Tottenham Hotspur vs. Man United: Which team do Gary Neville, Roy Keane think will win the Europa League final?
arts.sum: Former Manchester United captains Gary Neville and Roy Keane back the Red Devils to overcome Tottenham Hotspur in the final of the Europa League.

arts.ttl: Europa League final is not 'the be-all and end-all' for Ruben Amorim's future as Man United boss, insists Rio Ferdinand - as Red Devils legend says he will be vindicated for priortising the competition if they beat Tottenham
arts.sum: Rio Ferdinand has offered an expansive and deeply honest view of where Man United stand and the significance of their Europa League final against Tottenham.

arts.ttl: Meet the Man United and Spurs WAGs ahead of the Europa League final: From the wife who paid for her husband's early dates because he was a skint teenager, a former Miss France and the partner who is a qualified doctor
arts.sum: The Europa League final provides an opportunity for one of Tottenham Hotspur or Manchester United to salvage a Champions League place from what has been a forgettable season.

arts.ttl: Europa League final: Where Spurs v Man Utd will be won and lost
arts.sum: No player in Europa League history has made as many assists (19) or direct goal involvements (46) as Man Utd captain Bruno Fernandes . Spurs and Man Utd will put their nightmare domestic campaigns to one side in Bilbao on Wednesday evening in one of the biggest crossroads matches we have seen in years.

arts.ttl: When Mourinho's Man Utd met Spurs at Wembley
arts.sum: As Manchester United and Tottenham Hotspur prepare to meet in the Europa League final, BBC Sport looks back on their FA Cup semi-final clash from 2018.

arts.ttl: “Mind-blowing” – How close Man United star came to joining Europa League final opponents Spurs
arts.sum: Manchester United star Bruno Fernandes reportedly came very close to joining Tottenham just a few months before he ended up at Old Trafford. The Portugal international has been a rare success story for Man Utd in the post-Sir Alex Ferguson era, proving to be an inspired signing from Sporting Lisbon in January 2020. Fernandes will […] The post “Mind-blowing” – How close Man United star came to joining Europa League final opponents Spurs appeared first on CaughtOffside.

arts.ttl: Spanish media hit out at Man United and Tottenham fans for 'destroying the Bilbao streets' ahead of Europa League final - as Brits are spotted tearing down traffic lights and vomiting on the road after night of violence
arts.sum: Spanish news agency EFE reported that 'some fans are already losing control' in the streets in the centre of Bilbao ahead of the Europa League final at the San Mames Stadium.

arts.ttl: Tottenham and Manchester United fans descend on Bilbao for Europa League final – live
arts.sum: All the latest news before the final, 8pm BST kick-off Jonathan Wilson: why this game matters | Email Tom Lots of statistical fun to be had with tonight’s final, and The Knowledge this week has gone in hard on them, asking whether tonight’s match features the worst aggregate domestic league positions of any European finalists. Relive the 1988 Uefa Cup final and more here: All of which should get you in shape for our English Euro-finallists quiz. I got only eight and am having stern words with myself right now: Continue reading...

arts.ttl: €1.53b in market value - Spurs and Man Utd face off in most valuable Europa League final ever
arts.sum: On Wednesday night Tottenham Hotspur and Manchester United will lock horns to see which club will be crowned champions of the Europa League for the 2024/25 season. While the trophy in itself is a...
